title: Verify payment instrument and cardholder attribution
preconditions: Active and archived accounts, instruments, cardholders, and transactions with privacy-safe, full-identifier, compatible, incompatible, correction, and unknown-state inputs.
steps: Create, rename, archive, and list identities; assign and correct instrument and cardholder dimensions; exercise unknown, replay, archived, incompatible, and forbidden-data cases; inspect history and unrelated dimensions.
expected: Stable privacy-safe identities and at most one current value per attribution dimension are retained; correction history is attributable; invalid data fails closed; account, pool, category, evidence, and reconciliation remain independent.
